title: 'ZOJA' apple tasting box
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 1. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 24 CH1. These boxes were developed by a community of interest in order to preserve and promote old high-stemmed apple varieties. A box contains 6-9 varieties of apples (1 each), accompanied by info cards. The varieties are selected only from the Domleschg valley in Grisons.

title: Innovation
